DISPROVEN_METHOD: Sieve of Eratosthenes to 10^7, t-test of gap ratios vs phi, KS test vs Poisson on 664,579 primes
DISPROVEN_RESULT: Mean gap ratio = 2.1086 (NOT phi=1.618). t=123.72, p~0. phi hypothesis rejected at p<0.001. The original simulation returned True without any actual proof — circular reasoning.

hypothesis.hypothesis: The recursive complexity of Prime Number Distribution can be simplified by a factor of 1.618.

status: INVALID — simulation never tested the claim, just returned True
